REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANTS KARAVOLOS FAMILY TRUST ANDMICHAEL KARAVOLOS DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED, 10 DAYS TO ANSWER. CAUSES OF ACTION FOR FRAUDULENT CONCEALMENT; NUISANCE; BREACH OF IMPLIED WARRANTIES; VIOLATION OF SFRO 37.10B; VIOLATION OF CIVIL CODE 1941.3 AND UCL VIOLATION ARE SUFFICIENTLY ALLEGED AND ARE NOT UNCERTAIN. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER APPROVED AS TO FORM. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR., CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (D501)

MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS KARAVOLOS FAMILY TRUST and MICHAEL KARAVOLOS' Motion To Strike Portions Of Complaint is DENIED; allegations are sufficient and proper. Prevailing party to prepare order approved as to form. Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-03-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS KARAVOLOS FAMILY TRUST andMICHAEL KARAVOLOS DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Causes of action for fraudulent concealment; nuisance; breach of implied warranties; violation of SFRO 37.10B; violation of Civil Code 1941.3 and UCL violation are sufficiently alleged and are not uncertain. Prevailing party to prepare order approved as to form. Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)
